query:
SELECT q.id, q.qr_code_id, q.property_id, q.room_id, 
       LENGTH(q.property_id) as prop_id_len, LENGTH(q.room_id) as room_id_len,
       st.token, st.property_id as st_prop_id, st.room_id as st_room_id,
       LENGTH(st.property_id) as st_prop_len, LENGTH(st.room_id) as st_room_len
FROM peppr_qr_codes q
LEFT JOIN peppr_stay_tokens st ON st.room_id = q.room_id AND st.property_id = q.property_id
WHERE q.qr_code_id = 'QR-PEARL-102';
